en: There is some water on the table.
I need some advice.
She has a lot of knowledge.
We do not have much time.

zh: 冰箱里没有多少牛奶了。
en: There is not much milk in the fridge.
How much sugar do you need?

zh: 这项工作需要很多耐心。
en: This work requires a lot of patience.

zh: 她对音乐有很深的了解。
en: She has a great deal of knowledge about music.
We need more information.

zh: 他给了我一些有用的建议。
en: He gave me some useful advice.
There are three books on the table.
She has many friends.
There are not many students in the classroom.
How many books do you have?
He bought a few apples.
I only have a few minutes.
She has few friends.
We have little time left.
He drank a little water.

zh: 我需要一些面粉来做蛋糕。
en: I need some flour to make a cake.
Would you like some tea?
Are there any eggs in the fridge?
Do you have any questions?
I do not have any money.
She does not have any friends.

zh: 一片面包 / 两片面包
en: a piece of bread / two pieces of bread
a glass of water / three glasses of water

zh: 一袋大米 / 两袋大米
en: a bag of rice / two bags of rice
a sheet of paper / five sheets of paper

zh: 一块肥皂 / 两块肥皂
en: a bar of soap / two bars of soap
